name: Cole Slaw
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the mayonnaise and mustard.
2. Beat until well combined.
3. Slowly add the olive oil while continuing to beat until the mixture reaches the original thickness of the mayonnaise.
4. Add hot sauce and continue beating.
5. Incorporate ketchup and keep beating.
6. Stir in garlic salt, then wine vinegar. Continue beating thoroughly, adding lemon juice gradually.
7. Adjust seasoning with additional salt and pepper if needed.
8. Toss shredded cabbage, sliced peppers, and onions into a large salad bowl.
9. Pour the prepared sauce over the vegetables and toss well to coat evenly.
10. Allow the mixture to rest for about an hour before serving.
